title: alchemilla madurensis
intro: Alchemilla madurensis, also known as the lady's mantle, is a perennial plant belonging to the Rosaceae family, commonly found in the Andean region of South America. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal medicine due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla madurensis include the ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce menstrual cramps, and help to treat urinary tract infections. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
